results.rendered_html: kṣobha (von kṣubh) m. das Schwanken, zitternde Bewegung, Erschütterung; Unruhe, Aufregung: kṣobhodvegasamucchrita (samudra)  MBH. 1,1214 . vīci˚  MEGH. 29 . mīna˚ 93 . rathakṣobhapariśrama  RAGH. 1,58 .  VIKR. 52 . 10,8 . (nādena) jagati kṣobhakāriṇā  R. 6,11,1 . yakṣakṣobhakara (asura)  MBH. 3,8760 . eteṣāṃ kurvataḥ pāpaṃ rāṣṭrakṣobho bhaviṣyati 13,7208 . ko 'yamityāgatakṣobhaḥ kautūhalaparo 'bhavat 1,5385 . yadā kṣobhaṃ nopayāti nārtimanyatarastayoḥ  SUND. 1,16 . itthaṃ tanvi vapuḥ praśāntamapi te kṣobhaṃ karotyeva naḥ  BHARTṚ. 1,12 .  BRAHMA-P. in LA. 58,16 . prāyaḥ svaṃ mahimānaṃ kṣobhātpratipadyate hi janaḥ  ŚĀK. 158 . indriyakṣobha  KUMĀRAS. 3,69 .
